csvGroup.csvdescription: Site Administrators
Vendor Group for Vendor Portal

Filter Administrators
Those who can create Attributes and Units
Those who can create and manage Types
Those who can initiate replication
Business Report Author
Business Report Monitor
Synchronization Users for the projects enrolled in scheduled sharing synchronization

csvGroup.csvgroupName: PTC View and Print Only License
csvGroup.csvdescription: Populate this license group with all users for whom a PTC View and Print Only License was purchased. This license group is associated with the PTC View and Print Only License profile, which limits users to viewing and printing objects.
License group for authorizing creation of package importable ZIP files

workflow administrators
Creators who can create or update workflow templates containing java expressions.
life cycle administrators
Members can create and manage replication packages.

Members can create and export BAC Packages.
Members can import BAC Packages.
